title: Silsila Fashion Commerce Experience
shortDescription: A responsive Shopify experience for a Pakistani fashion brand, connecting product presentation, variants, delivery information, and customer support.
overview: The project focused on presenting a premium fashion product clearly while supporting the practical realities of local ecommerce.
The storefront structure brings together product discovery, size and color variants, mobile responsiveness, purchase guidance, and direct WhatsApp support.
problem: The brand needed a professional online store that could communicate product quality, reduce purchase uncertainty, and make ordering straightforward for mobile-first customers.
solution: I structured the product and collection experience around clear visual hierarchy, variant selection, delivery details, brand consistency, and a direct path to support.
results: Consistent experience across mobile and desktop
